author: doll-agent
content:
Add 4 tests covering the v2.0 header path:
1. v20_writer_roundtrip_huge_shape: 22000-dim shape forces v2.0 write, asserts version bytes and round-trip parse.
2. v20_reader_handcrafted_minimal: hand-built v2.0 byte blob; guards against writer/reader codependence on the u32-length branch.
3. v20_reader_rejects_oversized_header: 2 MB header length is rejected before allocation.
4. v30_reader_handcrafted_minimal: same u32 branch via v3.0, ensures version-2 logic doesn't bake in major==2.
